title: Questions regarding applications editing

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
Maybe this should be requests and not just questions… But, one step at a time.

Is there a way to:

  1. Duplicate Action blocks? (It would be great to have the ability to copy, then modify.)
  2. Move action blocks to another Feature?
  3. Duplicate an entire Feature?
  4. Duplicate and entire App?

I am working with “Integration” features specifically. I don’t know if these functions would be helpful to other developers.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @JCorrell!

As of today, there is no way of doing any of those things.

I understand how all of those features could be helpful to developers in different cases.

I will change this to the feature request section and share these requests with our team

Thank you for the requests!!

Cheers,
-Matias
